title: Header-only C++20 library
description: pjson must be a header-only C++20 library, consistent with pmm's design. No compiled library artifacts should be required. Users include pjson headers and compile directly.
rationale: Header-only design simplifies integration, eliminates ABI compatibility concerns, and follows pmm's established pattern.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: All pjson code is in header files
No .cpp source files are required for the library
